h1.visual_description: Large, bold, black text, left-aligned, featuring a thin purple vertical accent line to its left.
h1.example_text: Upstage aims to enrich your business by providing Easy-to-Apply AI solutions

h2.visual_description: Small, purple-colored text used as section labels or category headers.

h3.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, black text positioned directly beneath purple section labels.

visual_matchers.pattern: Purple vertical line on the left margin
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Indicates the primary page title or core value proposition.
Used for structural labels and section categorization.
Detailed list of features, services, or technical capabilities.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Numeric page indicators located in the bottom right corner (e.g., '3').
